responses.text:
Here are Aniket's key projects at SysCloud. Which one would you like to know in detail?

🤖 Sky 2.0 — AI-powered NL interface
🛡️ DAL AI-Agents — Operational monitoring agents
⚡ MDL 2.0 — Config-driven cloud framework
📊 Anomaly Detection — Prophet ML + Rule Engine
🔄 Restore & Export — High-speed data recovery + Bulk Export
🔍 Slack eDiscovery — PHP + Node.js full-stack integration
📈 Customer Dashboard — Multi-cloud insights
👥 Partner Portal — MSP management dashboard
🔧 MDLOPS Microservice — Async addon orchestration
🗄️ Batch Jobs Framework — 100K+ job orchestration

🤖 Sky 2.0 — SysCloud AI

Description: An AI-powered natural language interface where customers ask questions and the AI dynamically builds queries, redirects to the relevant page with pre-applied filters, and initiates Restore & Export actions — eliminating manual navigation entirely.

Tech Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · Claude · MCP · PostgreSQL · GraphQL

Key Metrics:
✓ NL-to-query in real time
✓ Full product coverage
✓ Zero manual navigation needed

🛡️ DAL AI-Agents

Description: 4 AI agents for automated operational monitoring — Database Health, Restore/Export, StartBackup, and PostGraphile Slow-Queries. Each agent detects and resolves issues automatically before they impact customers. Zero manual intervention required.

Tech Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · LLM · PostgreSQL · AI Agent framework

Key Metrics:
✓ 4 production agents
✓ Auto-remediation
✓ Zero customer impact

📊 Anomaly Detection

Description: AI-powered data integrity engine inside SysCloud's Backup & Compare module. Two mechanisms: (1) Rule Engine — deep JSON comparison between backup snapshots classifying changes into High/Medium/Low criticality; (2) Trend-Level — Facebook's Prophet ML via NestJS/Python with 99%, 95%, 80% confidence intervals.

Covers Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, and QuickBooks.

Tech Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · Prophet ML · NestJS · Python · PostgreSQL · MDLOps

Key Metrics:
✓ 3 cloud platforms
✓ 3 confidence intervals
✓ Rule + ML dual detection

⚡ MDL 2.0 Framework

Description: Replaced complex mutation logic with simple JSON-driven configuration. Each action executes as a micro-task inside PostGraphile. Migrated 12+ cloud integrations — adding a new cloud now requires zero code changes, only config. Owns Restore, Sync, OnDemand Backup, and Access Management.

Tech Stack: TypeScript · PostGraphile · PostgreSQL · JSON Config · Node.js

Key Metrics:
✓ 12+ cloud integrations
✓ Zero code per new cloud
✓ Owns restore, sync, backup

🟦 PHP Experience

Aniket has 1 year of hands-on PHP experience at SysCloud Technologies, used in two key areas:

1️⃣ Slack eDiscovery Search — Configured PHP backend services for Slack data ingestion and event handling as part of a full end-to-end integration across UI (React), backend, and database (PostgreSQL).

2️⃣ Bulk Export — Extended the PHP export backend to support multi-user exports under a single URL; refactored from single user-level to multi-user processing in one request with a unified download link.

Tech Stack: PHP · Node.js · TypeScript · GraphQL · React · PostgreSQL

🔍 Slack eDiscovery Search

Description: End-to-end integration of Slack eDiscovery across UI (React), backend (PHP + Node.js), and database (PostgreSQL). Customers can search and retrieve Slack files, messages, and chats directly through the platform. Configured PHP backend services for Slack data ingestion and event handling, built Node.js APIs, and wrote GraphQL mutations.

Also built Bulk Export as part of this, extending the PHP export backend from single user-level to multi-user exports in one request with a unified download URL.

Tech Stack: PHP · Node.js · TypeScript · GraphQL · React · PostgreSQL

Key Metrics:
✓ Full-stack delivery (UI + backend + DB)
✓ Bulk multi-user export
✓ PHP + Node.js backend

🔄 Restore & Export Action

Description: Built from scratch for Gen3, evolved through Gen4. Supports 3 modes: (1) User/Account/Company level full restore, (2) Folder level with deep recursive traversal preserving hierarchy, (3) Item level pinpoint restore. For archives 2+ years old, fetches metadata on-demand via AWS Athena. Also extended the PHP export backend to support Bulk Export; refactored from single user-level to multi-user exports in one request with a unified download URL.

Tech Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · PHP · AWS Athena · S3 · PostgreSQL · Recursive CTEs · Config-Driven

Key Metrics:
✓ Millions of items/sec
✓ Query time 10s+ → under 2s
✓ Bulk multi-user export

📈 Customer Dashboard

Description: Per-tenant operational intelligence interface with 13+ widgets — License Management, Backup/Restore/Export Status, Ransomware Detection, AI Anomaly Detection, eDiscovery, Archiver. All widgets follow a Unified Materialized View pattern with zero transactional impact.

Tech Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · PostgreSQL · Materialized Views · GraphQL · PostGraphile

Key Metrics:
✓ 13+ widgets
✓ 12+ cloud integrations
✓ Zero transactional impact

👥 Partner Portal Dashboard

Description: Multi-tenant MSP admin dashboard with 4-layer hierarchical aggregation: per-cloud per-customer → all-cloud per-customer → all-customer MSP level → per-cloud performance analysis. Data synced via AWS Lambda with zero PII exposure.

Tech Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · AWS Lambda · PostgreSQL · Multi-tenant · Aggregation

Key Metrics:
✓ 4-layer aggregation
✓ Zero PII exposure
✓ Full MSP visibility

🔧 MDLOPS Microservice

Description: TypeScript microservice built from scratch using cm-runner-plus + JSON-driven config to handle 5 heavy async add-on modules (eDiscovery, Hold, BDI, Archiver, Data Change Insights) with parallel execution via PM2 and anomaly detection using the Prophet algorithm.

Tech Stack: TypeScript · Node.js · PM2 · Prophet Algorithm · AWS

Key Metrics:
✓ 5 add-on modules
✓ Parallel execution
✓ Anomaly detection built-in

🗄️ PostgreSQL Batch Jobs Framework

Description: Centralized job orchestration engine (v3.0) on Node.js + AWS Batch. Fetches job definitions from Master DB, distributes across 5 DB types (Trans, Cache, Master, Grafana, CacheTrans). Priority job system + intelligent skip logic. Handles 100K+ jobs with full Grafana observability.

Tech Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · AWS Batch · DynamoDB · PostgreSQL · Grafana · Secrets Manager

Key Metrics:
✓ 100K+ jobs handled
✓ 5 DB types orchestrated
✓ Priority + skip logic

responses.pattern: what is syscloud|syscloud product|syscloud company|what does syscloud
responses.text:
SysCloud Technologies is a B2B SaaS company specializing in cloud data backup and protection. Their platform covers 12+ cloud providers — Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, QuickBooks, Slack, and more.

Aniket has been there 5+ years, growing from Intern to Senior Software Engineer.

Aniket integrated Slack eDiscovery Search into SysCloud — enabling customers to search and retrieve Slack files, messages, and chats. Built the backend Node.js APIs, GraphQL mutations, and collaborated on the frontend UI components.

Aniket worked across multiple SysCloud product generations:

• Gen3 — Unified config-driven Restore/Export, zero per-cloud code
• Gen4 — Cloud pages (Reports, Restore, Export, Dashboard) with config templates
• Gen5 — Extended with Unified Errors, Limitations, Homepage widgets

Each new cloud added with zero code changes.

Aniket's core strengths:

🔹 Backend Systems — scalable Node.js/TypeScript APIs and microservices
🔹 PostgreSQL — CTEs, materialized views, query optimization
🔹 Config-Driven Architecture — frameworks that scale without code changes
🔹 AWS — end-to-end production experience across 8+ services
🔹 AI Integration — LLM agents, MCP, Prophet ML anomaly detection
🔹 System Ownership — designs, builds, and ships end-to-end

Aniket is primarily a backend engineer — his frontend skills (React, CSS) are functional but not his primary strength. He's continuously learning and has integrated React into full-stack deliveries at SysCloud.
